Course Title: Third-Party AI Risk in SaaS Platforms
Who is this for: Project managers, operations managers, IT administrators, compliance officers, procurement specialists, department heads, team leads, office managers
Team or Dept this is for: IT, Operations, Compliance, Legal, Procurement, Risk Management
Description: When your existing tools quietly introduce AI-related risks.
Prerequisites: Learners should have basic familiarity with using SaaS tools in a professional workplace setting, such as cloud-based software for communication, project management, or document collaboration.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify the key ways that AI features embedded in everyday SaaS platforms can introduce third-party risk, and explain why these risks often go unnoticed until they cause a problem. You will also be able to apply a practical framework to assess and prioritise the AI-related risks present in the tools your organisation already uses.
